title: Falcon - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: When Teams is not detected, the Custom Button settings UI shows Microsoft Teams selected by default with a "not connected" message, and switching to Other Providers reveals additional options while switching back shows a modal confirming Teams is not connected.
steps: Open the Custom Button settings UI when Falcon/Mobile does not detect Teams.
Observe the layout showing two options: Microsoft Teams (selected by default) and Other Providers.
Check that a message indicates Microsoft Teams is not connected.
Select 'Other Providers' and verify that additional options appear: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing.
Select 'Microsoft Teams' again and verify that the other providers list is hidden.
Check that a modal appears saying Teams is not connected.
Tap 'OK' on the modal and verify it dismisses while Microsoft Teams remains selected.
expected: The Custom Button settings UI shows Microsoft Teams selected by default with a message that it is not connected. Selecting Other Providers reveals the additional options list. Selecting Microsoft Teams hides the list and shows a modal saying Teams is not connected. Tapping OK dismisses the modal while keeping Microsoft Teams selected.
